text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, March 02. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds like a sweet moment. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
